validation_queries.description: Check if 'timer sampling' exists in string entries
validation_queries.error_message: 'timer sampling' string not found in rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%timer_sampling%';

validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL string entries found in view_rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string IS NULL OR TRIM(string) = '';

validation_queries.description: Check that ROCpd contains more than 1000 timer_sampling samples
validation_queries.error_message: Less than 1001 'timer_sampling' entries found in rocpd_sample
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample R INNER JOIN rocpd_event E ON E.id = R.event_id AND E.guid = R.guid INNER JOIN rocpd_string S ON S.id = E.category_id AND S.guid = E.guid WHERE S.string = 'timer_sampling';

validation_queries.description: Verify no NULL or empty values in guid column
validation_queries.error_message: NULL or empty guid values found in rocpd_sample
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_sample WHERE guid IS NULL OR TRIM(guid) = '';
